name: Golden Ghoul
description: A ghoul that fell into molten gold.

name: Old Wolf
description: Wolves older than the island itself.

name: Wolf
description: Roaming the remains of a Castle far from its best days.

name: Zombie Villager
description: The real enemy isn't the dead - it's the living.

name: Cricket
description: Usually just a hop, skip, and a jump away.

name: Dragonfly
description: Glides by in a blur of wings and whispers.

name: Firefly
description: Flickers softly - here one moment, gone the next.

name: Fly
description: A common Garden pest, known for its big eyes.

name: Mosquito
description: One of nature's most useless creatures.

name: Moth
description: Fluttering around a Garden near you.

name: Praying Mantis
description: Strikes fast - *blink* - and it's already gone.

name: Slug
description: Methodical in movement, ineffective in survival.

name: Timestalk Clone
description: There can only be one, sometimes two apparently.

name: Zombuddy
description: Zombuddy that I used to know.

name: Arachne
description: The strongest spider in the den.

name: Broodmother
description: The Broodmother to end all Broodmothers.

name: Dasher Spider
description: Dashingly striking, watch for this spider's long jumps!

name: Gravel Skeleton
description: These Skeletons just never stay dead.

name: Rain Slime
description: These Slimes enjoy rain...and jumping to their deaths.

name: Silverfish
description: Though weak alone, they find strength in numbers.

name: Spider Jockey
description: The Skeletons have been controlling Spiders since the dawn of minekind.

name: Splitter Spider
description: If you think you've killed this spider, think again.

name: Dragon
description: Inside the Dragon's Den, there is no escape from the fury of the beasts.

name: End Stone Protector
description: Risen from the debris of Endstone.

name: Endermite
description: Hidden in the stone of The End.

name: Obsidian Defender
description: Forged from the forces of hot and cold.

name: Voidling Extremist
description: The top lieutenants of the void heraldry.

name: Zealot
description: Unwavering in their devotion to the Dragon.

name: Ghast
description: Their screams can be heard from miles away.

name: Kada Knight
description: A short walk for you is a long walk for them.

name: Magma Boss
description: Like a Magma Cube, but bigger.

name: Millennia-Aged Blaze
description: Blazes rarely live past the age of 900.

name: Smoldering Blaze
description: It's on fire. But more than usual.

name: Vanquisher
description: The embodiment of vengeful souls that come for revenge.

name: Emerald Slime
description: It is said that these slimes absorb emeralds to grow larger.

name: Lapis Zombie
description: These zombies adapted to their environment, using the lapis around them as a defense mechanism.

name: Miner Skeleton
description: These skeletons have crafted gear from the diamonds around them - resulting in a look both fashionable and protective.

name: Miner Zombie
description: Like their skeleton counterparts, these zombies have bedazzled themselves throughout the years.

name: Redstone Pigman
description: These pigmen will defend their redstone to the death.

name: Diamond Goblin
description: Does nothing but steal, even from its fellow goblins.

name: Ghost
description: It is hard to find that which you cannot see.

name: Glacite Bowman
description: Unable to see, it hunts by sound.

name: Glacite Caver
description: Dug too deep and never looked back.

name: Glacite Mage
description: Unknowing and unpredictable in its destruction.

name: Glacite Walker
description: Guardians of the Gate to the icy caves below.

name: Goblin
description: The Goblins have plagued the DWARVEN_MINES for centuries.

name: Goblin Raiders
description: If it moves, it gets smashed.

name: Golden Goblin
description: Take the things you love in life, and run with them.

name: Powder Ghast
description: Powder and coal replaces ash and soot!

name: Treasure Hoarder
description: The real treasure was the gold we found along the way.

name: Automaton
description: Ancient robots which protect the lands of the Precursor from whomever dares to trespass.

name: Butterfly
description: Beautiful critters that roam around harmlessly in Fairy regions.

name: Grunt
description: Team Treasurite is up to no good. Prepare for trouble!

name: Sludge
description: They say that the juice of these slimes has valuable magical properties.

name: Thyst
description: These infectious worms nourish themselves from Amethyst veins.

name: Worm
description: Stone worms can and will eat anything.

name: Yog
description: Born in the depths, risen from magma.

name: Bogged
description: Learn to swim before you learn to dive!

name: Ent
description: Thinks photosynthesis is a surface-plant propaganda invented by leafy elites to sell fertilizers.

name: The Lock Emperor
description: What exists within the Lock without his knowledge exists without his consent.

name: Tidetot
description: They are a little washed up.

name: Crazy Witch
description: This witch is brewing up trouble.

name: Headless Horseman
description: Some say he lost his mind long before he lost his head.

name: Angry Archaeologist
description: Angered by what he's found below.

name: Crypt Dreadlord
description: Trained in the dark art of wither magic.

name: Crypt Souleater
description: A soul a day keeps the doctor away.

name: Golem
description: Prefers to sleep in, grumpy if disturbed.

name: Lost Adventurer
description: Long lost to the depths of THE_CATACOMBS.

name: Mimic
description: Classic RPG trope, in block form.

name: Skeleton Grunt
description: Just more grunts in the platoon.

name: Skeleton Lord
description: Despite the lack of organs, still managed to be promoted.

name: Skeleton Master
description: Leader of the Catacombs' skeleton army.

name: Sniper
description: Said to have sniped adventurers from floors away.

name: Wither Guard
description: Never stopped anyone from entering the factory, but is trying his best.

name: Wither Husk
description: A shell of their former self.

name: Wither Miner
description: Kept in servitude for breaking blocks around the factory.

name: Withermancer
description: Learned their sorcery from the most vicious of teachers.

name: Zombie Grunt
description: Just more grunts in the platoon.

name: Agarimoo
description: Glactose-based heterogenous polysaccharide derived from rift algae.

name: Carrot King
description: Has a vicious streak a mile wide.

name: Frog Man
description: You'd think it'd make a normal frog sound, but it actually just says 'Ribbit' out loud.

name: Mithril Grubber
description: I die a little every time I take out a Grubber...

name: Oasis Rabbit
description: Loyal subject of the Carrot King.

name: Oasis Sheep
description: A test subject to see if a sheep shrinks when it dries.

name: Rider of the Deep
description: The chicken is the one in charge.

name: Sea Archer
description: Though a gifted archer, has a love for fistfights.

name: Sea Walker
description: Why swim when you can simply walk?

name: Sea Witch
description: She'll turn you into a newt!

name: Snapping Turtle
description: Doesn't look like its very good at it's job.

name: Water Hydra
description: Unlike a regular hydra, this one grows another body as well!

name: Wetwing
description: It's not like chickens can really fly anyways.

name: Wiki Tiki
description: An ancient fragment of the Kalhuiki tribe, lost from long before they went underground.

name: Fireproof Witch
description: Her brewing sessions have seen much success as of late.

name: Flaming Worm
description: Like a regular worm, but on fire.

name: Fried Chicken
description: Is it ready to eat, then?

name: Lava Blaze
description: Is it made of lava or does it just live in it?

name: Lava Pigman
description: Normally, dunking pork in lava causes it to get charred. But not this one!

name: Moogma
description: Produces 100% fresh magma on a daily basis!

name: Plhlegblast
description: Hard to spell, even harder to find.

name: Pyroclastic Worm
description: Travels up to 10 miles downhill during eruptions.

name: Thunder
description: This is what happens on a bad forecast.

name: Scarecrow
description: Also found at a yellow brick road.

name: Werewolf
description: A very careful and aware wolf.

name: Nurse Shark
description: Still studying to become a doctor.

name: Tiger Shark
description: Like a regular tiger, but swims.

name: Grinch
description: How the Grinch Stole Jerry Season.

name: Reindrake
description: A Reindrake forms from the depths.

name: Alligator
description: Just because he has thick skin doesn't mean he doesn't get sad sometimes.

name: Banshee
description: Scream, scream, let it all out!

name: Titanoboa
description: Yet another great reason to keep away from the Backwater Bayou.

name: Gaia Construct
description: A construct truly connected to the Earth.

name: King Minos
description: Rules with an iron fist and a fluffy sheep.

name: Minos Inquisitor
description: The ultimate guardian of Minos' Literature.

name: Blazing Golem
description: Trained by Lord Jawbus to serve Kuudra.

name: Blight
description: A blight upon the lands of SkyBlock.

name: Dropship
description: Contrary to popular belief, does not actually drop ships.

name: Inferno Magma Cube
description: So hot, it has to be measured in Kelvin.

name: KUUDRA Berserker
description: A single look at KUUDRA drove him into a frenzy.

name: KUUDRA Follower
description: Believes in the return of Kuudra.

name: KUUDRA Knocker
description: He is the one who knocks.

name: KUUDRA Landmine
description: Stepping on them seems to cause no harm!

name: Wandering Blaze
description: Lacks the legs to actually wander around, flies instead.
